steps.title: Isolate the term with s
steps.content: Starting with $5r = 8s + t$, subtract $t$ from both sides: $$5r - t = 8s$$

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: $s = 40r - t$ - multiplies rather than divides by 8. Incorrect.
  • B: $s = 8(5r - t)$ - multiplies by 8 instead of dividing. Incorrect.
  • C: $s = \frac{5}{8}r - t$ - fails to divide $t$ by 8. Incorrect.
  • D: $s = \frac{5r - t}{8}$ - both terms divided by 8 correctly. That is the correct answer.
